introSection: Jet Coaster is a steel roller coaster located at Tochinoki Family Land in Utsunomiya, Tochigi, Japan.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: The Jet Coaster was painted white. At some point between 2006 and 2010, it was repainted orange with green rails and blue supports. Later on, it was repainted to have all blue track and supports, with pink rails. The train was also retrofitted to have the lead car look like a E5/H5 Series Shinkansen bullet train.

fullText:
Jet Coaster is a steel roller coaster located at Tochinoki Family Land in Utsunomiya, Tochigi, Japan.

The Jet Coaster was painted white. At some point between 2006 and 2010, it was repainted orange with green rails and blue supports. Later on, it was repainted to have all blue track and supports, with pink rails. The train was also retrofitted to have the lead car look like a E5/H5 Series Shinkansen bullet train.
